meaning: vi.学习,听到,获悉vt.学习,学会,认识到
examples: The kids were quick to learn.
Where did you learn to weld?
Where did you learn to cook?
"Screenwriting, directing, camera, editing, producing, casting -- they learn all these skills, " Heinrich said.
Even folks who have done whisky tastings in the past can learn a thing or two.
